title: [v4.6] emergency gating test fix v4.6
body:
Emergency gating-test fixes for RHEL8

- the "podman {run,exec} /etc" test: runc now spits out "is a directory" instead of "permission denied". And, on exec, exits 255 instead of 126. Deal with it.

- workaround for https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/823 (skopeo XDG bug): always make sure XDG is defined for skopeo

Clean backport of #19259 

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: This does not address the SELinux failures.
@containers/podman-maintainers please merge this before we cut the final v4.6.
